name: clawbounties-assurance-review-v1
description: Adopt Clawcompiler Runtime v1 outputs inside Clawbounties reviewer workflows so marketplace decisions become more legible and evidence-rich.

userStories.title: Compiled evidence attachment contract
userStories.description: As a submission pipeline, I need a deterministic way to attach compiled evidence report envelopes to marketplace submissions so review surfaces can consume authoritative compiled outputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Submission contract can carry a compiled evidence report envelope or canonical reference to one
Stored submission state records whether compiled evidence was provided and the authoritative report hash
Malformed or unsupported compiled evidence inputs fail closed with deterministic error codes
Existing proof-bundle-only submissions remain supported

userStories.title: Compiled evidence verification and normalization
userStories.description: As the marketplace, I need compiled evidence reports verified and normalized at ingest so reviewer surfaces don’t trust raw uploaded JSON blindly.
acceptanceCriteria: Compiled evidence envelopes are verified using existing compiler/verifier contracts
Normalized marketplace state captures authoritative control counts, non-pass controls, and narrative presence/boundary state
Deterministic invalid codes exist for signature/hash/schema/binding failures
Invalid compiled evidence cannot silently upgrade reviewer posture

userStories.title: Submission detail and list assurance summary
userStories.description: As a requester or reviewer, I need submission APIs to summarize compiled evidence so I can see the authoritative posture without opening raw artifacts first.
acceptanceCriteria: `GET /v1/submissions/:id` includes a compiled evidence summary when available
`GET /v1/bounties/:id/submissions` includes compact compiled evidence posture fields
Summary distinguishes authoritative matrix validity from optional narrative validity
Non-pass controls and important reason codes are exposed deterministically

userStories.title: Requester and reviewer next-actions from compiled evidence
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I need next-actions and approval surfaces to reflect compiled evidence findings so marketplace decisions are faster and more consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Submission next-actions incorporate compiled evidence posture when available
Approval/reject/request-changes views surface key non-pass controls and narrative-boundary warnings
Authoritative vs non-authoritative evidence remains visually and contractually distinct
No silent auto-approval uplift from narrative-only or malformed compiled evidence

userStories.title: Arena and manager-review compiled evidence propagation
userStories.description: As ops, I need arena review and manager summaries to carry compiled evidence posture so autonomous routing learns from richer trust signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Arena review flow can carry compiled evidence summary fields when submissions include them
Manager/reviewer summaries preserve authoritative vs narrative boundaries
Autopilot/operator views can see compiled evidence availability and important non-pass controls
Integration stays additive and does not break existing arena flows
